---
title: "What is the Binomial Distribution?"
id: "BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp01"
section_id: "binomial_distribution-se01-sec01"
session_id: "binomial_distribution-se01"
toc: True
---









## Concept

_Add a clear explanation of the key idea, concept, or definition here._

## Example

_Provide an example to illustrate the concept._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance or practical application of this concept._

---

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Core Concepts and Interpretation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Worked Example in R</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
